summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of OpenClaw Mission Control dashboard iteration 5. All 22 requested features tested and working correctly. Major new features: Cowork inline conversation (NOT navigating to /chat), Model selector with 6 providers and correct counts, PlusMenu with persistent feature badges in InputBar.
passed_tests: Cowork page: task grid displays 21 tasks with categories (All, Schedule, Create, Analyze, Organize, Communicate) and search
Cowork page: clicking a task card opens INLINE conversation (stays on /cowork, does NOT navigate to /chat)
Cowork page: inline conversation shows user prompt from user's perspective (e.g., 'I need to set up a recurring task. I'll tell you what it is...')
Cowork page: inline conversation shows AI response after 2-second simulated delay
Cowork page: 'Working on it...' status with yellow dot visible during loading
Cowork page: right sidebar shows PROGRESS section with step circles (Understanding request ✓, Processing, Delivering result)
Cowork page: right sidebar shows WORKING FOLDER section
Cowork page: right sidebar shows CONTEXT section with + button
Cowork page: Reply input with 'Reply...' placeholder works - can type and send messages
Cowork page: Queue button sends reply and adds to conversation (4 messages after reply)
Cowork page: back button ('New task') returns to task grid
Cowork page: Recent tasks appear in left sidebar after clicking tasks (shows both clicked tasks)
Cowork page: clicking recent task switches to that conversation
Model selector: first panel shows 6 providers with correct counts - huggingface (9), ollama (11), opencode (13), opencode-go (3), openrouter (24), venice (31)
Model selector: hovering/clicking provider shows models with name, ID (monospace), cost badge, capability icons
Model selector: capability icons show green for supported, dim for partial, grey for unsupported (👁️ vision, 💻 coding, 🔧 tools, 📁 files, 🧠 reasoning, ⚡ fast)
Model selector: cost badges show Free (green), $ (blue), $$ (yellow), $$$ (red)
Model selector: selecting a model updates 'Select model' label to the model's display name persistently (e.g., 'Claude Opus 4.6')
PlusMenu: opens with all options (Add files, Add to project, Add from GitHub, Skills, Connectors, Plugins, Research, Web search, Use style)
PlusMenu: Skills submenu shows skills with checkmarks for enabled ones (deep-research ✓, code-review ✓)
PlusMenu: Connectors submenu shows connectors with toggle switches
PlusMenu: Web search toggle shows green checkmark when enabled, removes checkmark when disabled
PlusMenu: toggling skills updates the skills count badge in InputBar (e.g., '2 skills' → '3 skills')
InputBar: shows persistent feature chips - 'Web' badge (green) when web search enabled, 'X skills' badge when skills enabled
InputBar: Agent/Research mode toggle button works - changes label and styling (Agent=blue, Research=purple)
Chat page: sending a message produces simulated streaming response with 'typing...' indicator
Code page: terminal displays lobster mascot splash screen initially
Code page: terminal executes commands (ls -la shows 'Documents Downloads Desktop Projects .config', pwd shows '/Users/meg')
Code page: Clear button clears terminal and restores splash screen
Code page: Bypass permissions toggle and Local/Remote toggle work
seed_data_creation: None - using mock data from Zustand store
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 22+ requested features tested and working. The app is frontend-only with all state managed by Zustand store in useGateway.js. Key changes in this iteration: 1) Cowork page now has inline conversation view (not navigating to /chat), 2) Model selector has 6 real providers with ~91 models total, 3) PlusMenu toggles update persistent badges in InputBar. Mock data includes: 4 jobs, 4 approvals, 21 cowork tasks across 6 categories. All AI responses are simulated with setTimeout delays.
mocked_apis_note: ALL APIs are MOCKED via Zustand store - no real backend calls. Mocked: sendMessage (simulated chat response with streaming), executeCommand (simulated terminal output), switchModel (state update), cancelJob (state update), approveRequest/rejectRequest (state update), Cowork AI responses (simulated with 2-second setTimeout delay)
